subject: FW: Happy Holidays from OCRF
body:
From: Faith Kates [mailto:FaithK@nextmodelmanagement.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, December 12, 2007 10:31 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: FW: Happy Holidays from OCRF

 

 

 

 

Dear Members of the Board,

 

Below is the holiday outreach email that we sent to our supporters
yesterday morning. Please feel free to forward this message on to your
friends and colleagues.

 

Happy holidays!

 

 

________________________________

 

Ovarian Cancer Research Fund <http://www.ocrf.org> 

Dear Friend, 

On behalf of the Ovarian Cancer Research Fund, I want to wish you and
your family a wonderful holiday and a new year filled with good health
and happiness. I also want to thank you for your support of our mission:
to find a method of early detection and ultimately a cure for ovarian
cancer. 

Through our major scientific initiatives and grant award programs, we
have supported 115 of the nation's top researchers with over $19 million
in funds. Your support allows OCRF to increase our support for leading
edge medical research. 

We thank you for your continued support of our work. Together, we can
make a difference. 

With best regards, 

Faith Kates Kogan
President
OCRF Board of Directors 

Support OCRF
<http://www.ocrf.org/site/c.kwK0JbNTJtF/b.1196309/k.C534/Support_Our_Cau
se.htm>    Click here to make your year end gift.

The winter issue of HOPE, the OCRF newsletter, is now available as a PDF
on our website. Visit ocrf.org <http://www.ocrf.org>  or download it
directly here
<http://www.ocrf.org/atf/cf/%7B4330abe7-ed2e-48fa-8877-9bc1eb806f50%7D/W
INTER%2007%20NEWSLETTER%20LOW%20RES.PDF> .



Remove yourself from this mailing
<http://www.kintera.org/TR.asp?a=glLULcMXLpK3LoI&s=lmLZL9PULeK0KnNXKqH&m
=lwK0LhPZKkJ9H> .

Remove yourself from all mailings from Ovarian Cancer Research Fund
<http://www.kintera.org/TR.asp?a=9oJGIRNvFiJQJ4K&s=lmLZL9PULeK0KnNXKqH&m
=lwK0LhPZKkJ9H> .  <http://omt.kintera.org/omt/1404522037.gif> 

 

________________________________

NOTE:This message including any attachments contains information, some
or all of which, may be proprietary or legally privileged. It is for the
intended recipient only. If you have received this message by error,
please notify us immediately and destroy the related message. You, the
recipient, are obligated to maintain it in a safe, secure, and
confidential manner. Unauthorized re-disclosure or failure to maintain
confidentiality could subject you to penalties described in Federal and
State law. Next Management, LLC and any affiliate companies are not
responsible for errors or omissions in this message or any attachments.
body_html:
From: Faith Kates [mailto:FaithK@nextmodelmanagement.com]
Sent: Wednesday, December 12, 2007 10:31 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: FW: Happy Holidays from OCRF

 

 

 

 

Dear Members of the Board,

 

Below is the holiday outreach email that we sent to our supporters yesterday morning. Please feel free to forward this message on to your friends and colleagues.

 

Happy holidays!

 

 

 

Dear Friend,

On behalf of the Ovarian Cancer Research Fund, I want to wish you and your family a wonderful holiday and a new year filled with good health and happiness. I also want to thank you for your support of our mission: to find a method of early detection and ultimately a cure for ovarian cancer.

Through our major scientific initiatives and grant award programs, we have supported 115 of the nation’s top researchers with over $19 million in funds. Your support allows OCRF to increase our support for leading edge medical research.

We thank you for your continued support of our work. Together, we can make a difference.

With best regards,

Faith Kates Kogan
President
OCRF Board of Directors

   Click here to make your year end gift.

The winter issue of HOPE, the OCRF newsletter, is now available as a PDF on our website. Visit ocrf.org or download it directly here.



Remove yourself from this mailing.

Remove yourself from all mailings from Ovarian Cancer Research Fund.

 

NOTE:This message including any attachments contains information, some or all of which, may be proprietary or legally privileged. It is for the intended recipient only. If you have received this message by error, please notify us immediately and destroy the related message. You, the recipient, are obligated to maintain it in a safe, secure, and confidential manner. Unauthorized re-disclosure or failure to maintain confidentiality could subject you to penalties described in Federal and State law. Next Management, LLC and any affiliate companies are not responsible for errors or omissions in this message or any attachments.
